The other planets, Jupiter contacts after Saturn, are Venus and Mercury in

298 BHRIGU NANDI NADI
Scorpio: This will make the native fall for the charms of the opposite sex. The
Sun is placed in Jupiter's house, in the second to Venus and Mercury. He will
own multistoreyed buildings and live a prosperous life.
As Jupiter has no planets in 12th and the second to him the native will
have no sisters or brothers.
